name: arpg-test-game
description: Hollow Wake — a data-driven top-down action RPG (TypeScript + Canvas 2D + Electron).
author: Arianna

scripts.dist: npm run build && node scripts/make-build-info.mjs && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && node scripts/make-build-info.mjs && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.dist:all: npm run build && node scripts/make-build-info.mjs && electron-builder --win --linux --publish never
